preferred_name_ml.fr: courant thermique conventionnel à l'air libre
preferred_name_ml.de: konventioneller thermischer Strom in freier Luft
preferred_name_ml.zh: 约定自由空气发热电流

definition: maximum current carried continuously by unenclosed equipment in free air without the temperature rise of the various parts exceeding the limits specified

definition_ml.en: maximum current carried continuously by unenclosed equipment in free air without the temperature rise of the various parts exceeding the limits specified
definition_ml.fr: courant maximal supporté de manière continue par un matériel sans enveloppe à l’air libre sans que les échauffements des différentes parties ne dépassent les limites spécifiées
definition_ml.de: größter Strom, der dauerhaft von ungekapselten Geräten in freier Luft getragen werden kann, ohne das die unterschiedlichen Teile die festgelegten Erwärmungsgrenzwerte überschreiten
definition_ml.zh: 不封闭电器在自由空气中的最大电流值，且不同部件的温升不超过规定的极限值

raw_properties.MDC_P006.en: maximum current carried continuously by unenclosed equipment in free air without the temperature rise of the various parts exceeding the limits specified

raw_properties.MDC_P004.zh: 约定自由空气发热电流
